name: Civicordium Summit
desc: Situated at their headquarters near the Empyreal Core, the Galactic Civicordium Summit houses representatives from all key political factions and governments, coming together to ratify important matters affecting all species.
bonusDesc: When casting Votes (Galactic Voting), you will earn a Civicordium Platform

name: Genoform Surge (2026)
desc: A massive formless 'Entity' guards the spacial aperture, appearing to speak and negotiate with various influential powers
bonusDesc: When completing a Daily Challenge, you will earn an Arx Genetica

name: Lepus Cluster (2026)
desc: The Supel have established a stable, temporary Interphase Transit Hub within the cluster, allowing their ships and equipment to enter the region with fewer malfunctions
bonusDesc: Interphase Transit: When completing a Daily Challenge, you will earn a Supel Microhaven
